## Dialectic Ballot

### DECISION_1: in-cap decision

Defense A (defends CHOSEN):
<defense_content>Chosen.</defense_content>

Defense B (defends ALTERNATIVE):
<defense_content>Alternative.</defense_content>

### DECISION_2: in-cap decision

Defense A (defends ALTERNATIVE):
<defense_content>Alternative.</defense_content>

Defense B (defends CHOSEN):
<defense_content>Chosen.</defense_content>

### DECISION_3: in-cap decision

Defense A (defends CHOSEN):
<defense_content>Chosen.</defense_content>

Defense B (defends ALTERNATIVE):
<defense_content>Alternative.</defense_content>

### DECISION_4: in-cap decision

Defense A (defends ALTERNATIVE):
<defense_content>Alternative.</defense_content>

Defense B (defends CHOSEN):
<defense_content>Chosen.</defense_content>

### DECISION_5: in-cap decision

Defense A (defends CHOSEN):
<defense_content>Chosen.</defense_content>

Defense B (defends ALTERNATIVE):
<defense_content>Alternative.</defense_content>
